articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: How the rewards app Freecash scammed its way to the top of the app stores - TechCrunch
articles.description: Freecash was removed from Apple's App Store after TechCrunch reached out for comment.
articles.content:
A data harvesting app called Freecash appears to have tricked users as it quickly rose to the top charts on the App Store and Google Play, where it sat for months until a recent ban.
